title: polygala magdalenae
intro: Polygala magdalenae, also known as Madam Butler's or Magdalena's root, is a flowering plant native to the southeastern United States and Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Polygala magdalenae include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Polygala magdalenae can be made into teas, tinctures, or capsules, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its effects.
